BioPAX loader for biological pathways and networks.

  • Classes in org.jscience.natural.chemistry used by org.jscience.natural.biology
    Class
    Description
    Atom
    An atom in a molecular structure.
    ChemicalReaction
    Chemical reaction with equation balancing and stoichiometry.
    Element
    A chemical element.
    Molecule
    A molecule: collection of atoms connected by bonds.

  • Classes in org.jscience.natural.chemistry used by org.jscience.natural.chemistry
    Class
    Description
    Atom
    An atom in a molecular structure.
    Bond
    A chemical bond between two atoms.
    BondType
    Represents the type of a chemical bond.
    ChemicalReaction
    Chemical reaction with equation balancing and stoichiometry.
    ChemicalReactionParser.Formula
    Represents a parsed chemical formula.
    ChemicalReactionParser.Reaction
    Represents a parsed chemical reaction.
    ChemistryConstants.MatterState
    States of matter.
    ChemistryConstants.PhaseTransition
    Phase transitions.
    Element
    A chemical element.
    ElementCategory
    Categorization of chemical elements (e.g.
    Isotope
    Represents an isotope of a chemical element.
    MolecularGraph
    Represents a molecule as a graph of atoms and bonds.
    MolecularGraph.Bond

    Molecule
    A molecule: collection of atoms connected by bonds.
